option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.CommandeController" stylesheets="@../CSS/commandes.css,@../CSS/booking.css" styleClass="cmd-root">
<!-- SIDEBAR --> <left> <fx:include source="Sidebar.fxml"/> </left>
<!-- CENTER --> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" styleClass="cmd-scroll"> <content> <VBox spacing="24" styleClass="cmd-main"> <padding> <Insets top="25" right="30" bottom="25" left="30"/> </padding>
<!-- HEADER BLEU --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="10" styleClass="cmd-header"> <Label text="" styleClass="cmd-icon"/> <Label text="Mes commandes" styleClass="cmd-title"/> <Label text="Suivez l'état de vos commandes" styleClass="cmd-subtitle"/> </VBox>
<!-- COMMANDES --> <FlowPane fx:id="commandeContainer" hgap="20" vgap="20" prefWrapLength="1000"/> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center>
</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="tn.esprit.controllers.CommandeController" stylesheets="@../CSS/commandes.css,@../CSS/booking.css" styleClass="cmd-root">
<!-- SIDEBAR --> <left> <fx:include source="Sidebar.fxml"/> </left>
<!-- CENTER --> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" styleClass="cmd-scroll"> <content> <VBox spacing="24" styleClass="cmd-main"> <padding> <Insets top="25" right="30" bottom="25" left="30"/> </padding>
<!-- HEADER BLEU (amélioré) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="10" styleClass="cmd-header pretty-header"> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="14"> <Label text="" styleClass="cmd-header-icon" /> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="2"> <Label text="Mes commandes" styleClass="cmd-header-title" /> <Label text="Suivez l'état de vos commandes" styleClass="cmd-header-subtitle" /> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox>
<!-- COMMANDES --> <FlowPane fx:id="commandeContainer" hgap="20" vgap="20" prefWrapLength="1000"/> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center>
</BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
